description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a landscaped yard, featuring a main two-story white structure with a flat roof and large windows. The property is enclosed by a dark fence and includes a detached garage or outbuilding with a pitched roof. The front yard is adorned with a pathway, manicured lawns, and several flowering trees, while the backyard contains a swimming pool, patio, and additional greenery. The house has a clean, geometric design with a mix of white and gray exterior finishes, complemented by wood and glass accents. The windows are generously sized and arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The surrounding lot is spacious, with a buffer of grass and clusters of trees along the perimeter.
description: A modern two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped yard, featuring a pool, patio, and detached garage within a fenced property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pathway, manicured lawn, and symmetrical landscaping with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat-roofed main house, detached garage, and backyard pool area with patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, pool, patio, and more private garden space with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, pool, and the rear and side elevations of the house with large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a simple door, short steps, and a straight pathway flanked by landscaping; no porch or columns.
